allow: Bash(py scripts/search.py "tattoo studio portfolio minimal black white editorial premium" --design-system -f markdown)
Bash(py scripts/search.py "carousel swipe gallery mobile scroll sticky parallax" --domain ux -n 12)
Bash(mkdir -p public/hero public/video public/studio public/tattoos public/events public/brand public/misc)

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Stopped duplicate server on 3001 \(PID $p\)" } else { "No server on 3001" })
Bash(py scripts/search.py "hero portrait vertical image split editorial fullscreen" --domain landing -n 6)
Bash(py scripts/search.py "portrait image full bleed object-fit focal point responsive hero" --domain ux -n 8)
Bash(py scripts/search.py "section transition scroll reveal continuity flow spacing rhythm cohesion" --domain ux -n 10)
Bash(py scripts/search.py "motion-driven scroll storytelling seamless continuous flow" --domain style -n 3)
Bash(git -c user.name="Moritz" -c user.email="moritzlindebner@outlook.de" commit -q -m "Sicherungspunkt: Stand vor Hero-Umbau \(Agentura-Muster Experiment\)")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Dev-Server \(PID $p\) gestoppt" } else { "kein Server auf 3000" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Test-Path ".next"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ".next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Cache .next geloescht" } else { ".next nicht vorhanden" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "no listener on 3001" })

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3000,3001\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_ on $port" } catch { "could not kill $_" } } } else { "nothing on $port" } })
